iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. Gabbard backs Trump's threat determination after NCTC Director Kent resigned (said Iran posed 'no imminent threat'). No nuclear enrichment escalation. Zero nuclear test indicators. War continues but nuclear track stable/dampened. Kent resignation actually reduces nuclear justification credibility.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — IMMINENT. Iran launches new ballistic missile volley at Israel (March 18): 2 killed in Ramat Gan/Tel Aviv, 8 impact sites. BUT missile volume declining from ~100/day (first days) to single digits. IDF confirms 11 US soldiers killed, 2 IDF + 11 civilians killed, 3,440+ injured in Israel. Drones target US diplomatic facility in Baghdad. 12+ MQ-9 Reapers lost. Trump's Hormuz operation could extend war by 2 months. No allied escorts committed. Larijani confirmed killed, IDF vows to hunt Mojtaba Khamenei. Oil >$100. War continues at high intensity but Iranian strike capability degrading.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — IMMINENT. IDF launches large-scale preemptive strikes on Hezbollah rocket launchers. IDF warns of 'larger-than-standard' overnight Hezbollah barrage incoming. Evacuation orders for south Lebanon. 886 killed in Lebanon (67 women, 111 children), 1M+ displaced. Israel Katz: no return for displaced Lebanese. 'Limited' ground operations expanding. Guardian/Merz calls offensive an 'error'. Hezbollah targets Nahariya, shrapnel at Jerusalem holy sites. Major escalation imminent.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 20% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — ELEVATED. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey confirmed. NATO bolstering Incirlik ballistic missile defense. Kurecik radar likely primary target. Turkey deployed F-16s to Northern Cyprus. No new incidents in past 24h. Stable.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 15% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — ELEVATED. India evacuating nationals from ME. Hormuz deal with Iran ongoing. No new India-Pakistan signals. Stable.

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 18% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — ELEVATED. Russia expanding intelligence sharing AND military cooperation with Iran. Arms supply ongoing. No direct intervention yet. Peace talks frozen. Ukraine front escalation continues but no major territorial changes. Stable.

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 7% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. China brokering Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire. Trump postpones China trip due to Iran war. No PLA activity changes. Taiwan stable. China flights normal. Status quo maintained.

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. Reports of Kim Jong Un missile test from low-credibility sources (Indian clickbait site, YouTube). Not verified by Reuters/BBC/AP. Cannot activate signals. Extended quiet period continues. No confirmed provocations.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 42% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — CRITICAL. Three-sided peace talks postponed (US focused on Iran). Russia rejects European peacekeepers. Fighting continues. Trump distracted by Iran war. No ceasefire signals. Stable at current level.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 59% (stable). Day 19 (00:00 UTC) — IMMINENT. China deploying special envoy to broker ceasefire. Fighting continues, October ceasefire not holding. Multiple nations calling for truce. Polymarket tracking ceasefire-by-March-31 probability. Border clashes ongoing. PBS: most severe fighting between neighbors since Taliban takeover.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: 2 killed in Ramat Gan, Tel Aviv from Iranian missile barrage — 8 impact sites (Day 19)
latest_news.text: Iran launches new ballistic missile volley at Israel. 2 killed (man and woman) from shrapnel in Ramat Gan near Tel Aviv. 8 suspected impact sites. Sirens across central Israel, Jerusalem area, West Bank, southern Israel.

latest_news.headline: IDF launches large-scale strikes on Hezbollah, warns of 'larger-than-standard' overnight barrage
latest_news.text: IDF preemptively strikes Hezbollah rocket launchers in Lebanon ahead of anticipated massive rocket attack. Evacuation orders issued for southern Lebanon. IDF warns of 'larger-than-standard' overnight barrage from Hezbollah.

latest_news.headline: Iran confirms SNSC head Ali Larijani killed, IDF vows to hunt Mojtaba Khamenei
latest_news.text: Iran's Supreme National Security Council confirms Ali Larijani killed alongside his son and protection team. IDF spokesperson says 'Mojtaba Khamenei is not safe, we will hunt him down.' Regime decapitation campaign continues.

latest_news.headline: DNI Gabbard backs Trump's threat determination after NCTC Director Kent resigns
latest_news.text: DNI Tulsi Gabbard publicly backs Trump's authority to determine imminent threat after NCTC Director Kent resigned over war objections. Gabbard: 'President Trump concluded the terrorist Islamist regime in Iran posed an imminent threat.' No nuclear evidence cited.

latest_news.headline: Iran missile barrage volume declining — from ~100 first days to single digits
latest_news.text: Iran's retaliatory missile barrages against Israel declining significantly. INSS data shows nearly 100 projectiles first two days, now single digits daily. US says it has 'destroyed Iran missile capacity' though Iran still launching.

latest_news.headline: Drones target US diplomatic facility in Baghdad
latest_news.text: Iran-backed militia drones target US diplomatic facility in Baghdad. Second major attack on US diplomatic presence in Iraq this week.

latest_news.headline: More than a dozen MQ-9 Reaper drones lost in combat operations against Iran
latest_news.text: 12+ MQ-9 Reaper drones lost to Iranian missile fire or destroyed on ground. Significant degradation of US ISR and strike capability in theater.

latest_news.headline: China moves to broker ceasefire in Pakistan-Afghanistan conflict
latest_news.text: China deploying special envoy to mediate Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire. Fighting continues along border, October ceasefire not holding. Multiple nations calling for truce.

latest_news.headline: Trump's Hormuz operation could extend Iran war by 2 months
latest_news.text: Sources tell JPost Trump's Strait of Hormuz naval operation 'could extend the war by as much as two months.' No allied commitments for escort missions. US going unilateral.

latest_news.headline: 11 US soldiers killed, 3,440+ Israelis injured from Iranian ballistic missiles (cumulative)
latest_news.text: Cumulative toll: 11 US soldiers killed in Iran theater. 2 IDF soldiers + 11 Israeli civilians killed, 3,440+ injured from Iranian ballistic missiles since Feb 28.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 18, 23:04 UTC) — War continues across 5 active theaters. 1,444 killed in Iran, 18,551 wounded. 1M+ displaced in Lebanon. Brent $106. Japan releases oil reserves. Germany opposes Lebanon ground offensive. Trump goes unilateral on Hormuz. No ceasefire signals in any theater. NATO bolsters Incirlik defenses.
